issues.description: The implementation of the fixture package (manifest, hashing, error taxonomy) is missing. The player only modified an __init__.py file and created no new files or tests.
issues.suggestion: Implement the required logic in src/fleet_memory/fixture/ and provide corresponding unit tests.

issues.description: Evidence collection aborted with status 'partial_gate_abort'. Tests failed or could not be run due to a substrate error (FileNotFoundError in pytest temp directory).
issues.suggestion: Ensure the environment is stable and that all required files are present so that the test-orchestrator can complete its run.
